title: Inspect the stock ledger
description: Reconcile on-hand against available, reserved, and sold to surface oversell or leaked holds.
body: Use when stock numbers are in doubt for a SKU. Actions: read on-hand, available, reserved, and sold quantities and check the identity on-hand = available + reserved + sold; report any SKU where reserved exceeds what active carts justify or where the identity breaks. Do not adjust stock counts without first reporting the reconciliation. This skill is read-only and exposes capability only; it must not write inventory without runtime permission. Validation signals include a per-SKU reconciliation with the discrepancy quantified. Risk boundary: a negative available or broken identity signals oversell — escalate before more checkouts proceed.
